title: gmgn-token
subtitle: Token info, security checks, pool data, holders, and top traders via GMGN OpenAPI.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Set GMGN_API_KEY in ARC / Vercel. Use gmgn-cli token commands or enable this skill in NEXUS after confirm.

title: gmgn-market
subtitle: K-line OHLCV, trending meme rankings, trenches new launches, and real-time signals.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Set GMGN_API_KEY. Integrated in NEXUS Alpha via /v1/market/rank.

title: gmgn-portfolio
subtitle: Wallet holdings, activity, PnL stats, and transaction history.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Set GMGN_API_KEY. Enable after confirm in NEXUS GMGN panel.

title: gmgn-track
subtitle: Follow-wallet trades, KOL buys, and smart-money flow tracking.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Set GMGN_API_KEY. Enable after confirm in NEXUS GMGN panel.

title: gmgn-swap
subtitle: Execute swaps, limit orders, and strategy orders on Solana, BSC, and Base.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Requires GMGN_API_KEY + GMGN_PRIVATE_KEY (Ed25519). Confirm before enabling trade skill.

title: gmgn-cooking
subtitle: One-command cooking: buy plus take-profit/stop-loss in a single flow.
installation: npm install -g gmgn-cli. Requires GMGN_API_KEY + GMGN_PRIVATE_KEY. Confirm before enabling.
